report_name: Trump Signs Executive Order on AI Security, Mandating 'Frontier Model' Testing

identities.name: Trump Administration
identities.description: Issued the executive order “Promoting Advanced Artificial Intelligence Innovation and Security” to establish a federal framework for managing cybersecurity risks from advanced AI models.

identities.name: U.S. Department of the Treasury
identities.description: Tasked by the executive order with leading the creation of an AI cybersecurity clearinghouse to coordinate vulnerability disclosure.

identities.name: Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency
identities.description: Directed by the executive order to issue guidance to accelerate the cyber defense of federal networks, including promoting AI-enabled defensive tools.

identities.name: National Security Agency
identities.description: A U.S. federal government agency responsible for implementing the mandates of the executive order on AI security.

identities.name: U.S. Department of Defense
identities.description: A U.S. federal government agency responsible for implementing the mandates of the executive order on AI security.

identities.name: Anthropic
identities.description: An AI developer company identified as a target participant for the voluntary pre-release testing program established by the executive order.

identities.name: OpenAI
identities.description: An AI developer company identified as a target participant for the voluntary pre-release testing program established by the executive order.

identities.name: Google
identities.description: An AI developer company identified as a target participant for the voluntary pre-release testing program established by the executive order.

identities.name: xAI
identities.description: An AI developer company identified as a target participant for the voluntary pre-release testing program established by the executive order.

identities.name: AI Developers
identities.description: A class of companies at the forefront of AI research and development who are encouraged to participate in the voluntary government security testing program for 'frontier models'.

identities.name: Critical Infrastructure Operators
identities.description: A class of organizations that will partner with the AI cybersecurity clearinghouse to receive threat intelligence and prioritized vulnerability data.
